title: Conservative & consistent wins
author: zulfiquar1
selftext: It took me 13 months to build this prediction engine I started off with llm ofcourse to validate the buzz but to generalize to 8 different countries stock market it's not upto llm so I trained a custom model and forward tested both parallel and I have finalized the best model the results you can see in the image. Go ahead select your country and search a stock we track and update our prediction in the track record page publicly.
